message:
fix(hpack): use saturating_add for dynamic table size tracking

Defensive fix: HPACK dynamic table insert used unchecked addition for
self.size, which could theoretically overflow on 32-bit platforms with
extreme max_size values. Use saturating_add to match the saturating_sub
already used in eviction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
